scenes.visual_note: Mira owl appears, confident posture, teal accent glow
scenes.subtitle_text: Your insulin data, finally making sense.
scenes.voice_text: GluMira turns your insulin data into something you can actually understand — no maths degree required.

scenes.visual_note: A terrain-style density map shows insulin pressure across 24 hours
scenes.subtitle_text: See your insulin landscape across the full day.
scenes.voice_text: This density map shows where insulin is doing the most work throughout your day. Peaks, valleys — all visible at a glance.

scenes.visual_note: Patterns are highlighted with amber accents in the data
scenes.subtitle_text: GluMira spots patterns you might miss.
scenes.voice_text: Recurring highs after lunch? A late-night dip pattern? GluMira catches these trends and surfaces them for you.

scenes.visual_note: Dashboard widgets light up one by one in sequence
scenes.voice_text: Your dashboard brings together glucose, insulin, meals, and insights — all in one clean view.
That's the quick tour. Dive in — your dashboard is ready.
